architecture:
ProbSalesTransformer(
  (input_proj): Sequential(
    (0): Linear(in_features=1, out_features=152, bias=True)
    (1): GELU(approximate='none')
    (2): LayerNorm((152,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
  )
  (pos_enc): PositionalEncoding(
    (dropout): Dropout(p=0.07525035735243228, inplace=False)
  )
  (blocks): ModuleList(
    (0-1): 2 x TransformerBlock(
      (attn): MultiheadAttention(
        (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=152, out_features=152, bias=True)
      )
      (norm1): LayerNorm((152,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
      (norm2): LayerNorm((152,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
      (dropout1): Dropout(p=0.07525035735243228, inplace=False)
      (dropout2): Dropout(p=0.07525035735243228, inplace=False)
      (ff): Sequential(
        (0): Linear(in_features=152, out_features=469, bias=True)
        (1): GELU(approximate='none')
        (2): Dropout(p=0.07525035735243228, inplace=False)
        (3): Linear(in_features=469, out_features=152, bias=True)
      )
    )
  )
  (norm): LayerNorm((152,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
  (mu_decoder): HorizonConditionedHead(
    (attn): MultiheadAttention(
      (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=152, out_features=152, bias=True)
    )
    (norm): LayerNorm((152,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    (res): ResidualForecastHead(
      (block): Sequential(
        (0): Linear(in_features=152, out_features=152, bias=True)
        (1): GELU(approximate='none')
        (2): Dropout(p=0.07525035735243228, inplace=False)
        (3): Linear(in_features=152, out_features=152, bias=True)
      )
      (norm): LayerNorm((152,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    )
    (out): Linear(in_features=152, out_features=1, bias=True)
  )
  (sigma_decoder): HorizonConditionedHead(
    (attn): MultiheadAttention(
      (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=152, out_features=152, bias=True)
    )
    (norm): LayerNorm((152,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    (res): ResidualForecastHead(
      (block): Sequential(
        (0): Linear(in_features=152, out_features=152, bias=True)
        (1): GELU(approximate='none')
        (2): Dropout(p=0.07525035735243228, inplace=False)
        (3): Linear(in_features=152, out_features=152, bias=True)
      )
      (norm): LayerNorm((152,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    )
    (out): Linear(in_features=152, out_features=1, bias=True)
  )
  (softplus): Softplus(beta=1.0, threshold=20.0)
)
